title: 第 8 課｜質心：把整個系統看成一點｜Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學
description:
複雜的多粒子系統如何化繁為簡？從質量加權位置定義質心 R，並理解內力抵消後為何有 M R̈ = F 外。

本影片為《Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學》教學系列第 8 課（繁體中文版）。

title: Lesson 8 | The Centre of Mass | Landau–Lifshitz
description:
How can one point simplify a many-particle system? We define the centre of mass R using mass-weighted positions and see why internal forces cancel, leaving M R̈ = F external.

Lesson 8 of the Landau–Lifshitz Classical Mechanics teaching series (English edition).
